name: Web Search
description: Look up external information in real time

memoryInteraction.withoutMemory: Finds answers but forgets them. Each lookup starts fresh.
memoryInteraction.withMemory: Finds answers AND builds knowledge. Cross-references past searches.

name: Calculator
description: Precise numerical reasoning — budgets, dosages, distances

name: Memory Bank
description: Store and recall information across steps within a task

name: Planner
description: Break complex tasks into ordered sub-steps before executing

memoryInteraction.withoutMemory: Creates a plan but loses track during execution. Steps get skipped or repeated.
memoryInteraction.withMemory: Creates a plan AND follows through. Each completed step informs the next.

name: Code Executor
description: Write and run scripts to automate tasks and process data

memoryInteraction.withoutMemory: Writes code but can't iterate. If it fails, starts over from scratch.
memoryInteraction.withMemory: Writes code, remembers errors, debugs iteratively.

name: Alert System
description: Flag anomalies, send warnings, escalate to human oversight

memoryInteraction.withoutMemory: Catches obvious one-time anomalies only. No pattern recognition.
memoryInteraction.withMemory: Detects escalating patterns over time. Dramatically better threat detection.
